content.en:
The other two Extreme Dao Monuments obtained this time, Ye Tian placed them here in the Terran Race, not only can he comprehend, but if someone in the Terran Race has cultivated to the realm of a half-step perfect controller, he can also comprehend the Extreme Dao Monument.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian gradually cultivated the Extreme Dao of Force and the Extreme Dao of Wind to the consummation realm through these two Extreme Dao Monuments.

More and more Extreme Dao was cultivated to the Consummation Realm by Ye Tian, but the Endless Extreme Dao was still in the Xiaocheng realm, thinking about the progress of the Dacheng realm, but it would take a long time to really ascend to the Dacheng realm.

"It's too difficult, even if other cultivators comprehend their own extreme paths, they won't be able to practice the Endless Extreme Path, which involves a large number of extreme paths, like I do. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, the more complicated and difficult the extreme path, once he is promoted to the Dacheng realm, the more strength he can break through will naturally increase.

In the blink of an eye, more than 10 billion eternal years have passed.

Ye Tian copied the Primordial Void Golden Stone again and again, and comprehended countless times, and finally comprehended the Spatial Extreme Dao to the extreme level on this day.

Rumble!!!!

As soon as he comprehended the Spatial Extreme Dao of the Extreme Level, Ye Tian's perception of the Primordial Black Sea became clearer.

Swish!

Ye Tian escaped into the Primordial Black Sea, trying to see how long he could stay in the Primordial Black Sea this time.

"I could only stay for a few minutes before, but now it's definitely more than that!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Time passed minute by minute, and Ye Tian was still not excluded.

It took about an hour for the feeling of rejection to develop.

It wasn't until two hours that Ye Tiancai couldn't bear it anymore and was ostracized.

"Two hours, that's my limit at the moment. Ye Tian said happily.

To comprehend the Extreme Light Pole, you can only stay in the Primordial Black Sea for a few minutes, but if you comprehend the Extreme Space Pole, the strength increased in the Primordial Black Sea will suddenly increase to two hours.

If you comprehend an extreme path again, will you be able to stay for a few days?

"It's a pity that I didn't get the treasure that contains the Extreme Time Pole, otherwise I would have been able to stay in the Primordial Black Sea forever if I comprehended the Extreme Time Extreme. The combination of the Extreme Time Pole and the Extreme Space Pole is far from being comparable to other Extreme Poles!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took out that fragment and prepared to comprehend the extreme defense pole contained in this fragment.

He didn't arrange a magic circle to comprehend, and the reason why the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm of the Demon Dragon Tower arranged the magic circle to comprehend was because he didn't want to waste a little bit of extreme defense extreme power.

But Ye Tian didn't care, even if it was wasted, he could continue to copy it.

Therefore, Ye Tian directly began to comprehend.

Strictly speaking, this fragment does not belong to the same kind of Extreme Dao treasure as the Extreme Mangbai Grass and the Primordial Void Golden Stone, and this fragment cannot be swallowed into the body to refine and improve its own perception of the Extreme Defense Extreme Dao, it can only slowly comprehend.

But for Ye Tian, it is the best thing to assist in enlightenment.

Time passed slowly, and as the power of the Extreme Defense Extreme Dao contained in this fragment was exhausted, Ye Tian's understanding and perception of the Extreme Defense Extreme Dao was also slowly improving.

On this day, this fragment was completely useless, and although it was of good quality and still extremely strong, it could not be used for enlightenment.

"Copy!"

Ye Tian began to copy the original fragments.

This time, it took him a long time and a lot of resources to successfully replicate it.

Another fragment appeared in Ye Tian's hand, but this was only a copied fragment, not a real fragment.

"Let's continue to meditate!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In this way, Ye Tian comprehended the Extreme Defense Extreme Dao again and again, and his understanding became deeper and deeper.

At this rate, it didn't even take ten billion eternal years for him to have the hope of comprehending the Defensive Extreme Dao to the limit realm.

At that time, he will have the Three Extreme Extremes!

On this day, Ye Tian had not yet comprehended the Defensive Extreme Dao to the extreme level, but he had successfully created a top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique.

This is a top-notch Extreme Dao control technique that involves the Spatial Extreme Dao, and Ye Tian has comprehended the Extreme Space Extreme Dao, so the power of this top-level Extreme Dao Mastery Technique that bursts out in his hands far surpasses the top-level Extreme Dao Mastery Technique of those who are perfect controllers of the top True Realm.

Ye Tian named this top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique Extreme Void Fist.

Not only does the Extreme Void Fist contain powerful attack power, but it can also neutralize the attacks of others, transferring the enemy's attacks to the Primordial Black Sea through the Extreme Space Pole.

After creating the Extreme Empty Fist, Ye Tian's strength has improved a lot.

Then, another long period passed.

After more than eight billion years of penance, Ye Tian finally succeeded in comprehending the Extreme Defense Extreme Dao with the help of fragments.

At this point, Ye Tian comprehended the Three Extreme Extreme Dao.

......

Primordial Black Sea.

Ye Tian came here, and he stayed here for a few days, and he was still not ostracized.

"It seems that this time, I have been in the Primordial Black Sea long enough!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Day after day passed, and this time Ye Tian stayed for a full month before he was ostracized by the Primordial Black Sea.

What does a month mean?

This meant that Ye Tian could explore a lot of places in the Primordial Black Sea, and maybe there was hope to find good things in the Primordial Black Sea!

"For such a long time, let's go to the primordial Black Sea and try to fly constantly. "

Subsequently, Ye Tian entered the Primordial Black Sea again and began to fly and shuttle in the Primordial Black Sea, and the speed was very fast.

Ye Tian wanted to verify one thing, that is, if he kept flying like this, he could cross the end of the realm and the extreme deep sea.

After all, a casual crossing of the Primordial Black Sea is the distance of the vast territory of the Frontier, doesn't this mean that flying a long distance in the Primordial Black Sea can cross the entire Frontier?

Doesn't this mean that you can leave the end of the realm and the extreme deep sea?

However, when Ye Tian flew quickly for a while, suddenly time and space distorted, and he found himself stepping into another area of the Primordial Black Sea, but his position was repositioned.

"It's been repositioned!"

Ye Tian knew what this meant, that is, he couldn't leave the Boundary Rim Region, no matter how far he flew in the Primordial Black Sea, he would still be located within the Realm Rim or the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Region.

In addition, there is another possibility, that is, every creature who is eligible to enter the Primordial Black Sea will be located in a different area of the Primordial Black Sea.

Because of this, he couldn't meet other powerhouses in the primordial Black Sea.

Subsequently, Ye Tian flew for a long time and repositioned again and again.

In this way, Ye Tian's position in the Primordial Black Sea was really changeable, and it was even more difficult for others to lock.

"It's no wonder that those Extreme Realm Perfect Masters who have comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Extreme Dao dare to establish the Dojo in the Primordial Black Sea, and they are not afraid of others finding it, because it is really too difficult to find. If it is located countless times, it is equivalent to establishing the dojo in the deepest part of the primordial Black Sea, who can find it?"

Ye Tian muttered.

If it weren't for this trial, he wouldn't have known about it.

In addition, Ye Tian found that there were coordinates in his will, and these coordinates were the positioning of the primordial Black Sea.

That is, the number of times he positioned, how many coordinates were generated, and each time he could enter the Primordial Black Sea from a different position.

In this way, he can appear in one of the countless locations that the original Black Sea has located.

"In the future, if you fight with the enemy and the enemy escapes into the Primordial Black Sea, if you can't lock the opponent's position in the Primordial Black Sea at the first time, then even if you enter a moment later, you won't be able to find the other party. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, every strong person who entered the Primordial Black Sea might have mastered countless positioning locations in the Primordial Black Sea, who knows from which positioning location he entered?

Therefore, if you can't track it in time, you will naturally not be able to chase down the other party.
